chunks.title: Mockery and Prayer Against Enemies
chunks.reason: Contains the mockery of Sanballat and Tobiah followed by Nehemiah's prayer for judgment.

chunks.title: Progress and Gathering of Enemies
chunks.reason: Describes the progress of the wall construction and the subsequent alliance of enemies to fight Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Discouragement and Encouragement
chunks.reason: Combines the complaint of the people about the burden with Nehemiah's speech to encourage them.

chunks.title: Organization of Labor and Guard
chunks.reason: Details the strategic arrangement of workers and guards, including the signal system and night watch.
